finalExamDetail.summaryDescription: Overview of what this final exam contains and when it runs.
finalExamDetail.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this final exam?

finalExamList.pageDescription: Create final exams from existing teacher exams. Set availability period and one attempt per learner. Learners see them on their calendar.
finalExamList.noFinalExams: No final exams yet. Create one from an existing exam.
finalExamList.getStartedHint: Get started by creating your first final exam.

finalExamCreate.title: Create final exam
finalExamCreate.selectQuestions: Select questions (leave all to use full exam)
finalExamCreate.showResultToLearnerHelp: If unchecked, results are hidden until you release them.
finalExamCreate.randomPoolMode: Randomized from pool (different set per learner)
finalExamCreate.questionsPerAttemptHelp: Learners receive this many random non-duplicate questions from the selected pool.
finalExamCreate.sourceExamsSectionDesc: Add one or more exams. From each exam, choose which questions to include.
finalExamCreate.filterByTeacherDesc1: Showing exams for the teacher selected on the list page. Change the filter there to see another teacher's exams.
finalExamCreate.filterByTeacherDesc2: Select a teacher on the Final Exams list page, then open Create to see only that teacher's exams here.
finalExamCreate.errorSelectClassAndPeriod: Please select class and set availability period.
finalExamCreate.errorEndAfterStart: End time must be after start time.
finalExamCreate.errorAddSourceAndQuestions: Add at least one source exam and select at least one question.
finalExamCreate.previewHeading: How it will look for learners
finalExamCreate.previewSubheading: When they open this final exam they will see:
finalExamCreate.previewTitleOptionalHint: Set a custom name in Settings (optional)

finalExamEdit.title: Edit final exam
finalExamEdit.selectQuestions: Select questions (leave all to use full exam)
finalExamEdit.sourceExamsSectionDesc: Change which exams and questions are included. Add or remove source exams and adjust selected questions.
finalExamEdit.errorSelectClassAndPeriod: Please select class and set availability period.
finalExamEdit.errorEndAfterStart: End time must be after start time.
finalExamEdit.errorAddSourceAndQuestions: Add at least one source exam and select at least one question.
finalExamEdit.previewHeading: How it will look for learners
finalExamEdit.previewSubheading: When they open this final exam they will see:
finalExamEdit.previewTitleOptionalHint: Set a custom name in Settings (optional)
